description: Schema reference for bottoms tech packs.

bottoms_schema.garment_type: one of: jeans, trousers, chinos, shorts, joggers, cargo trousers, midi skirt, pencil skirt, a-line skirt, wide-leg trousers

material.fabric_type: e.g. denim, cotton twill, wool, linen, corduroy
material.colour: e.g. black, navy, indigo, charcoal, olive, cream

measurements.inseam: integer inches, typical range 26-36 (omit for shorts and skirts)
measurements.outseam: integer inches, typical range 36-46 (omit for shorts and skirts)

construction.closure_type: e.g. zip fly, button fly, elastic, drawstring

style.fit: one of: skinny, slim, straight, regular, relaxed, wide, tapered, baggy, very baggy
style.length: one of: cropped, regular, long, ankle, full

notes: Numeric ranges are advisory bounds used for plausibility validation in inference.py, not hard rejection rules. Inseam and outseam are omitted for shorts and skirts; all other measurements apply to every bottoms garment type.
